name: Zucchini-Layered Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions: Prepare the basic meat loaf mixture. Spread 1/3 of it evenly in an ungreased loaf pan (9 x 5 x 3 inches). Sprinkle half each of the shredded Swiss cheese, thinly sliced zucchini, and chopped pimento in layers, ensuring they are within 1/2 inch of all sides of the pan. Repeat the layers, finishing with a layer of meat mixture on top. Make sure to spread the mixture to cover the sides of the pan completely. Omit the catsup and bake uncovered for 1 1/4 hours. Let the meat loaf stand for 5 to 10 minutes before slicing into thick pieces. Serve on a heated platter.
